---
title: ""
---

<div class="home-grid">
<div>
<img src="assets/photo.jpg" class="profile-photo" alt="Jean de Oliveira"/>
</div>
<div>
<div class="name-block">
<div class="display-name">Jean de Oliveira</div>
<p style="white-space: nowrap;"><strong>PhD Candidate in Economics</strong> &nbsp; Goethe University Frankfurt</p>
</div>
<hr/>
<p>I am a PhD candidate at Goethe University Frankfurt (Graduate School of Economics, Finance and Management). I study how trust and beliefs drive economic behavior, with applications in household finance, development, and environmental economics.</p>
<div class="contact-block">
Contact: <a href="mailto:deoliveira@econ.uni-frankfurt.de">deoliveira@econ.uni-frankfurt.de</a><br/><br/>
<a href="assets/cv.pdf" class="cv-link">Curriculum Vitae</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

---

## Working Papers

<!-- NOTE: JMP designation confirmed as Jean's preference. Verify with Haliassos before publishing. -->

::: {.paper}
[**Branches and Roots: Banking Presence and Deforestation in Amazonian Indigenous Lands**]{.paper-title} <!-- [Job Market Paper]{.jmp-label} -->

[With Douglas K.G. de Araujo]{.paper-authors}

[Each additional bank branch near an indigenous territory in the Amazon reduces cumulative forest loss by 1.7 km² over five years — not through income effects, but through social capital: branches increase local interactions, build community ties, and reduce criminal networks' capacity to operate.]{.paper-summary}

[PDF *(coming soon)*]{.paper-links}
:::

::: {.paper}
[**Actual and Perceived Financial Knowledge over the Life Cycle**]{.paper-title}

[Overconfidence in financial knowledge — believing you understand money better than you actually do — causally increases financial distress, including falling behind on mortgages and drawing down retirement savings early. People don't learn because they don't know they have a problem.]{.paper-summary}

[PDF *(coming soon)*]{.paper-links}
:::

## Work in Progress

::: {.paper}
[**Too Uncertain to Trust the Signal?**]{.paper-title}

[With Johannes Zahner]{.paper-authors}
:::

::: {.paper}
[**Bayes Rules**]{.paper-title}

[With Johannes Zahner]{.paper-authors}
:::

---

## Publications

*In Engineering*

**New Technologies for Newborn Safety**

::: {.publication}
[[Patent]]{.patent-label} [**Oral Feeding Readiness Prediction System for Neonates.**](https://doi.org/10.8080/1020240010931)
Korean Intellectual Property Office, 2024.
:::

::: {.publication}
[**Quantitative non-nutritive sucking measurement as a predictor of oral feeding readiness in newborns.**](https://www.frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/fped.2023.1143416/full)
Kyeong Jae Lee, Jean de Oliveira, et al.
*Frontiers in Pediatrics*, 2023.
:::

::: {.publication}
[**A silver nanowire-based flexible pressure sensor to measure the non-nutritive sucking power of neonates.**](https://mnsl-journal.springeropen.com/articles/10.1186/s40486-020-00121-0)
Jean de Oliveira, Tausif Muhammad & Sohee Kim.
*Micro & Nano Systems Letters*, 2020.
:::
